As of the latest validation:

* UAT backend/storage pipeline has been completed successfully.
* Base environment pipeline backend key handling has been fixed.
* The pipeline now uses the BackendKey from Azure DevOps Library instead of falling back to the hardcoded backend key in main.tf.
* UAT build and Terraform plan have been validated using the correct UAT backend/state.
* Latest infra changes have been approved, merged, and deployed from the standard branch path.
* The merged-branch deployment completed successfully across Dev, Test, and UAT.
* Latest infra updates included Function App managed identity Key Vault access and DIA exception notification app settings.
